description: A critical introduction to the literature of China from early texts through the late imperial period. Works include poetry, prose, fiction and drama. Not open to students who completed E ASIAN 351 prior to Fall 2019.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 102(or E ASIAN 102 prior to Fall 2019), placement intoASIALANG 201, or graduate/professional standing
